facts: Ykk Usa operates a manufacturing facility located at 3340 Chestney Rd, Macon, Ga 31217, Us.
The facility is located in Bibb County, Georgia.
The plant manufactures zippers and fasteners.
The facility imports supplies and samples for zipper and fastener manufacturing.

Imported materials include plastic zippers, aluminium alloy wire, brass profiles, brass wire, metal zippers, nickel silver profiles, nylon taffeta tape, plastic parts, stainless steel wire, zipper parts, spools, cops, bobbins, 100% polyester filament yarn, 100% polyester monofilament yarn, hook & loop fastening tape, and zipper making machines.
The company's top import source countries are Japan with 2,003 shipments, Indonesia with 1,607 shipments, Taiwan with 1,248 shipments, China with 583 shipments, and Hong Kong with 133 shipments.
The page reports Ykk Usa's total sea shipments over time with a last month increase of 3619.34% over a 1-year period.
Recent shipment activity is documented with dates ranging from May to June 2026, showing imports from Asia, India, South America, and Europe to the US.
